steps.title: Write the probability equation
steps.content:
The probability is the number of Safaricom subscribers divided by the total number of subscribers. On October 31, 2016, there were $104$ million total subscribers, so
$$\frac{p}{104}=0.38$$

steps.title: Calculate and round
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by $104$:
$$p=0.38(104)=39.52$$
Rounded to the nearest integer, this is $40$.
The answer is 40.
